title: Dashboard redesign — final audit against architecture spec, file map, gap report
gate: Do NOT begin until DASHBOARD_REDESIGN_VERIFY_001 is APPROVED (PASS decision).
objective: Produce the final audit document: compare the implemented redesign against DASHBOARD_REDESIGN_SPEC_001.md item-by-item, produce a file change map, identify any outstanding gaps, and close the redesign task pack. This is the exit gate for the entire redesign effort.

spec_compliance: Read DASHBOARD_REDESIGN_SPEC_001.md. For each item in the spec, state whether it was implemented, partially implemented, or skipped.
Tab list compliance: all 5 tabs present with correct names and default?
LIVE tab focal area order: game monitor → position cards → account strip?
Payload mapping: for each field in the spec's payload table, confirm it is present in the UI sourced from the correct API
Demotion list: confirm each demoted item is no longer on the main page / LIVE tab
Truth-model checklist: re-run the checklist from the spec and confirm pass for each item
file_change_map: List every section/function in dashboard.html that was added or modified across all redesign phases
List every field added to dashboard_server.py if any were added
Confirm no files outside dashboard.html and dashboard_server.py were touched
gap_report: List any spec items that were not implemented and why
List any items that were implemented differently from the spec and whether that is acceptable
List any known outstanding issues (e.g. stream credentials still blocked, advisory data for GAMES tab may be sparse when no shadow recs exist)
incident_closure: Explicitly state: BUY_NO current_held_price path is now correct in both execution layer (EXECUTION_HELD_SIDE_SEMANTICS_001) and display layer (this redesign)
Explicitly state: backed_team semantics are now consistent from execution (paper_exec/risk) through transport (SSE) to display (LIVE tab cards)
Explicitly state: shadow advisory is now properly segregated — GAMES tab only, not competing with position truth

contents: Spec compliance table: item | spec | implemented | status
File change map: file | function/section | change summary
Incident closure statements (BUY_NO pricing, backed_team, shadow segregation)
Overall verdict: COMPLETE, COMPLETE_WITH_GAPS, or INCOMPLETE

acceptance_criteria: Spec compliance table covers every item from DASHBOARD_REDESIGN_SPEC_001.md
File change map is complete — no phantom file changes
Incident closure section explicitly addresses BUY_NO pricing and shadow segregation
Overall verdict is COMPLETE or COMPLETE_WITH_GAPS (with gaps documented)
out_of_scope: New gaps being opened as new tasks (the audit documents them; the manager decides next steps)
rollback: No changes made. Delete DASHBOARD_REDESIGN_AUDIT_REPORT_001.md if audit is rejected.
